_comment: Project-local Claude Code settings for shelltutor. Tracked in git; operator-private overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Scope kept minimal per CONTRIBUTING.md:72-75 ('local commit discipline is the enforcement layer'). Two purposes: (1) auto-allow the small set of project-specific verifications without prompting, (2) operationalize FF-005 (shellcheck shelltutor) from the audit as a soft post-edit warning.

hooks.command:
if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f shelltutor ]; then out=$(shellcheck -s bash -S warning shelltutor 2>&1 || true); if [ -n "$out" ]; then printf '
--- shellcheck warnings on shelltutor (FF-005) ---
%s
' "$out"; fi; fi
